ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transmission_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device from which the data was transmitted */,
  "record_type_id" TEXT /* Record type identifier (e.g., 'L' for terminator record) */,
  "sequence_number" TEXT /* Sequence number of the transmission record */,
  "termination_code" TEXT /* Termination code indicating the cause of termination */,
  "transmission_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the transmission occurred */,
  "transmission_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the transmission (e.g., 'R' for required, 'D' for data) */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the system where the transmission originated */,
  "transmission_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for transmission (e.g., HTTP, FTP) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the transmitted data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "transmission_status" TEXT /* Status of the transmission (e.g., 'success', 'failed') */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if transmission failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_records_termination_code FOREIGN KEY ("termination_code") REFERENCES termination_codes ("code_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_records_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_records_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., Immunodiagnostic System) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "device_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of the system (e.g., Immunodiagnostic System) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the system */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the system */,
  "system_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the system */,
  "system_operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "termination_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each termination code */,
  "code_value" TEXT /* Termination code value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the termination code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transmission record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transmission record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., 'success', 'failed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES transmission_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
